details.note: Fix B: Removed re-throw from toggle mutationFn catch, removed onError handler, included server name in toast description. Single error surface.
Fix E: Added Effect.timeout(30_000ms) with catchTag('TimeoutError') to all 3 semaphore locks (createAndStore, disconnect, watch). Added console.log on lock acquire/release with server name.
Fix F: Updated ErrorBoundary fallback to include err.message in UI text so user sees the actual error.
Fix A: Removed command.length===0 from isValidMcpEntry to avoid silently dropping previously saved entries on read. Empty command validation already exists in dialog-edit-mcp.tsx handleSave.
